Platforms & Products
I’ve Brought to Life

🏥
Healthcare · Agentic AI
Patient Engagement Hub
IKS Health · Nov 2025 – Present

An AI-native agentic platform orchestrating every touchpoint in the patient-provider relationship — from intelligent scheduling and intake automation to care coordination and proactive follow-up. Built with human-in-the-loop safeguards to ensure clinical oversight at critical decision points, enabling at-scale automation across the care continuum.

Agentic AIHITL WorkflowsCare Coordination
🔗
Healthcare · API Platform
UHC Global API Marketplace
Optum (UHG) · Apr – Jul 2025

A developer-first API ecosystem democratizing access to UnitedHealthcare’s clinical and administrative data through standardized REST APIs. Designed to eliminate integration friction for provider organizations — enabling real-time eligibility checks, claims submissions, and patient data access at scale, while driving 50% YoY growth in active integrations.

REST APIs50% YoY Growth500+ Clinics
⚡
Insurance · AI Automation
ICS — Ingenious Claims Service
Optum (UHG) · Apr 2022 – Apr 2025

An end-to-end AI adjudication engine that reimagined medical claims processing — transforming a largely manual, multi-day workflow into a near-real-time intelligent system. Applied ML for automated data extraction, rule application, and decision-making, with full HIPAA compliance and bias-audited model governance throughout the AI lifecycle.

2M+ Claims/yr3 days → 15 min$1M+ Saved
📞
Insurance · Conversation AI
ACD — Auto Contact Documentation
Optum (UHG)

A real-time conversation intelligence tool generating structured, accurate post-call summaries during live agent interactions. By eliminating manual after-call documentation, ACD reduces handle time, improves agent experience, creates a rich audit trail — directly lowering operational costs and improving member outcomes.

Real-time NLPReduced Handle TimeCall Analytics
📊
Healthcare · Data Intelligence
Provider Data Platform (PDP)
Optum (UHG) · Jun 2019 – Apr 2022

A unified data intelligence platform aggregating, normalizing, and enriching provider data from dozens of disparate enterprise systems into a single queryable layer. Powers real-time dashboards and operational tools for customer service and clinical teams, enabling faster and more accurate decision-making across the provider network.

Multi-source IngestionKPI DesignEnterprise Scale
✈️
Aviation · IoT Safety
MaintainSmart
Airbus · Apr 2016 – Apr 2017

An RFID-based smart maintenance safety system creating a digital inventory of every tool entering an aircraft maintenance zone — preventing Foreign Object Damage (FOD) incidents, a leading cause of aviation accidents. Built zero-to-one from ideation through patent filing and Airbus BizLab accelerator selection.

RFID / IoTPatent FiledFOD Prevention
Work Experience

A Decade of
Building & Leading

Associate VP — Product·IKS HealthNov 2025 – Present

Serving as the de-facto Chief Product Officer for IKS Health’s flagship Patient Engagement Hub — an agentic AI platform transforming how healthcare organizations manage the patient journey. Responsible for setting multi-year product strategy tied directly to company revenue goals, building and mentoring a high-performing PM team, and representing product at the board level. Spearheading the organization’s responsible AI agenda, ensuring governance frameworks keep pace with the rapid deployment of AI-powered clinical workflows.

Lead Product Manager·CitrixAug – Nov 2025

Owned product strategy and roadmap for Citrix Workspace App across five operating systems — one of Citrix’s most widely deployed enterprise products. Led a unified UI vision to bring consistency and modern UX standards across platforms, while working directly with Apple and Google to integrate platform-native innovations that elevated the experience for enterprise customers globally.

Senior Technical Product Manager·Optum (UHG)Apr – Jul 2025

Architected the product and go-to-market strategy for UHC’s Global API Marketplace — transforming fragmented data access points into a curated, developer-friendly suite of REST APIs. Onboarded 500+ provider clinics, drove 50% year-over-year growth in active integrations, and ran external hackathons and workshops that accelerated adoption across the partner ecosystem, unlocking new subscription revenue streams.

⚡ 50% YoY API Growth500+ Clinics Onboarded
Product Manager·Optum (UHG)Apr 2022 – Apr 2025

Led the Ingenious Claims Service (ICS) from concept to enterprise scale — an AI claims adjudication engine processing 2M+ claims annually. Delivered one of Optum’s most tangible AI wins: reducing turnaround time from 3 days to 15 minutes while saving over $1M annually. Navigated stringent HIPAA requirements, oversaw bias auditing for all deployed ML models, and secured a provisional patent for the engine’s core adjudication methodology.

🏆 Optum “Make IT Happen 2023”Provisional Patent Granted
Product Owner·Optum (UHG)Jun 2019 – Apr 2022

Established the data foundation for the Provider Data Platform (PDP) and ACET — designing multi-source ingestion pipelines and an orchestration layer that unified data from disparate enterprise claims systems. Defined the key KPIs and metrics powering dashboards used by customer service and clinical operations teams. Managed a team of BAs and ran agile ceremonies for complex multi-quarter delivery programs.

Product Manager·AirbusApr 2016 – Apr 2017

Identified a critical safety gap in aircraft maintenance and built MaintainSmart from zero — an IoT system using RFID smart tags to digitally track every tool in an aircraft maintenance environment, preventing Foreign Object Damage incidents. Developed the full business case, led customer discovery with airline MRO teams, navigated Airbus’s internal patent process, and was selected for the prestigious Airbus India BizLab accelerator program.

🏆 Airbus India Quarterly AwardBizLab Selection
Simulations Engineer·AirbusJul 2015 – Mar 2016

Designed computational simulation models for both commercial and helicopter divisions. Developed algorithms for flight dynamics simulations and performed Probabilistic Risk Assessments (PRA) to evaluate foreign object collision impact — building the engineering foundation that later informed the MaintainSmart safety concept.
